title: Xtra Creamy Korean Pistachio Hwajeon
description: A charred, creamy, and cozy Korean dish featuring pistachio, this Xtra Creamy Korean Pistachio Hwajeon is a unique and delicious hwajeon recipe, steamed to perfection in a ramekin vessel, with an ayurvedic-rajasic friendly twist, making it a great option for a comforting snack or dessert
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a medium bowl, whisk together pistachio meal, rice flour, cornstarch, sugar, and salt
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, heavy cream, egg, and water
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined
Pour the batter into 4 ramekins, filling them about 3/4 of the way full
Place the ramekins in a large steamer basket, leaving about 1 inch of space between each ramekin
Steam the hwajeon over boiling water for 12 minutes, or until they are cooked through and slightly charred on the bottom
Remove the hwajeon from the steamer and let them cool for a few minutes
Serve the Xtra Creamy Korean Pistachio Hwajeon warm, garnished with additional pistachio meal if desired
